summary: Hey David, what a week! You're now at 257.9 lbs, which means you've crushed 57.1 lbs total since starting—that's genuinely impressive progress. Your recent pace of 1.25 lbs per week shows you're in a sustainable rhythm, and logging 10 days this period tells me you're staying engaged with your data. One thing to focus on next week is hitting those logging days consistently, since the weeks you track everything tend to be your strongest. You're doing the real work here, and your Mounjaro, Dexcom, and Garmin are giving you the tools—keep leaning on them and trust the process you've built.
